Package com.airtribe.meditrack.service

Class PatientService

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.service.PatientService
public class PatientService extends Object
Service class for managing patients.

    • PatientService

  • Method Details

    • registerPatient

      public Patient registerPatient(String name, String email, String phoneNumber, String address, LocalDate dateOfBirth, String gender, String bloodGroup) throws InvalidDataException
      Register a new patient.
      Parameters:
      name - the patient's name
      email - the patient's email
      phoneNumber - the patient's phone number
      address - the patient's address
      dateOfBirth - the patient's date of birth
      gender - the patient's gender
      bloodGroup - the patient's blood group
      Returns:
      the registered patient
      Throws:
      InvalidDataException

    • getPatientById

      public Optional<Patient> getPatientById(String patientId)
      Get a patient by ID.
      Parameters:
      patientId - the patient's ID
      Returns:
      Optional containing the patient or empty

    • searchPatient

      public Optional<Patient> searchPatient(String patientId)
      Search a patient by ID.
      Parameters:
      patientId - the patient ID
      Returns:
      Optional containing the patient or empty

    • searchPatient

      public List<Patient> searchPatient(String name, boolean searchByName)
      Search patients by name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to search for
      Returns:
      list of matching patients

    • searchPatient

      public List<Patient> searchPatient(int age)
      Search patients by age.
      Parameters:
      age - the age to search for
      Returns:
      list of matching patients

    • getAllPatients

      public List<Patient> getAllPatients()
      Get all patients.

      public List<Patient> getPatientsByGender(String gender)
      Get patients by gender.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      list of patients with the given gender

      public List<Patient> getPatientsByBloodGroup(String bloodGroup)
      Get patients by blood group.

      Returns:
      list of patients with the given blood group

    • updatePatient

      public boolean updatePatient(String patientId, Patient patient) throws InvalidDataException
      Update patient information.
      Parameters:
      patientId - the patient's ID
      patient - the updated patient information
      Returns:
      true if updated, false otherwise
      Throws:
      InvalidDataException
